fields.title: Investigate tau format:check baseline
fields.description: `cd extensions/tau && npm run format:check` exits 1 and reports format issues across many existing src/test files, while `npm run gate` passes. This was observed after prompt-copy test cleanup; modified files were formatted with `npx oxfmt` before running the check.
fields.acceptance_criteria: `npm run format:check` either passes in `extensions/tau` or the project documents why format checking is not part of the active gate.
